hero.title:
NOT JUST
A TEE.
hero.sub: Sorona fibre from the USA. Manufactured in France. Designed in Vietnam. Exceptionally comfortable. Uncompromisingly high-fashion.

origin.label: ORIGIN STORY
origin.title:
THREE COUNTRIES.
ONE TEE.
origin.body: We refused to compromise on a single step. The fibre is Sorona™ — a bio-based yarn engineered by DuPont in the USA, known for its extraordinary softness and sustainable profile. The garment is cut and sewn in France, where a century of atelier craftsmanship meets modern production precision. The design is entirely ours — conceived in Vietnam, rooted in driip-'s editorial vision.

sorona.label: MATERIAL
sorona.title:
SORONA™
FIBRE
sorona.body: Sorona™ is a partially bio-based polymer fibre developed by DuPont. Softer than conventional polyester, warmer than cotton alone, and engineered to move with your body. It drapes like silk, breathes like nothing else, and stays comfortable from morning to midnight.

france.label: MANUFACTURING
france.title:
MADE IN
FRANCE
france.body: Every unit of the Driip Tee is cut and assembled in France — where precision is not a marketing line but an expectation. French production at this level means measured seam allowances, finished edges that lie perfectly flat, and a garment that holds its silhouette wash after wash.

design.label: DESIGN
design.title:
DESIGNED IN
VIETNAM
design.body: The creative direction, fit geometry, and aesthetic identity are entirely Vietnamese — born inside the driip- studio. This is not a licensed product or a rebrand. It is an original work: a tee designed from a blank sheet of paper by people who believe that Vietnamese fashion can set global standards.

feel.label: THE EXPERIENCE
feel.title:
EXTRAORDINARILY
COMFORTABLE.
feel.body: Words fall short until you put it on. The weight is present but never heavy. The hand-feel is cool and smooth. The silhouette drops cleanly from the shoulder with zero pulling. Wear it to a gallery, to the airport, or over nothing at all — it performs at every level.

tee.manifesto:
Designed in Vietnam.
Built in France.
Engineered in the USA.
Worn everywhere.
tee.footerText: The Driip Tee is our original product — the clearest expression of what this brand believes clothing should be.
